full_text:
Guan Ping 關平
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Ping (關平)was born in Hedong. Served Shu. Guan Yu’s son (adopted in novel). Executed with Guan Yu by Sun Quan. Guan Ping was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Guan Ping lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
